title: Wire manager queue action completion flow in dashboard
description: Integrate queue action completion API in manager dashboard, including optimistic update, retry/error handling, and deterministic UX state transitions for resolved queue items.
acceptance_criteria: Queue cards expose action CTA wired to backend completion endpoint
Resolved queue item updates in-place with deterministic loading/success/error UX
Unauthorized/session-expired responses route to existing auth/session fallback paths
